positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a group of fantastical woodland creatures (deer, fox, owl, hare) gathered under a bioluminescent canopy of oversized, mystical flowers. The art style is a blend of ornate vintage folklore etching and modern vector art, rendered with thick, clean outlines and deep, saturated jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst). The composition is perfectly balanced, featuring the animals interacting playfully around a central, glowing element (like a crystal or magical spring). The depth is minimal, designed to be visually punchy and flat against fabric. Use strong contrast between the glowing elements and the deep forest shadows. Whimsical, magical, fairytale aesthetic, high detail.
negative: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, fused fingers, poorly drawn, cartoonish, grainy, washed out, extra limbs
